description: Reconstruct the pre-dawn sky over the historical Song Dynasty capital of Kaifeng, China (34.80° N, 114.30° E, Altitude: 70 m) on July 4, 1054 AD at 20:30 UTC to visualize the 'Guest Star' (Crab Nebula/M1) in the constellation Taurus. Configure the sky display by disabling the atmosphere and enabling constellation lines, constellation labels, and the azimuthal coordinate grid. Center the view on the Crab Nebula and save a screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Ensure all location and display configurations are saved to the application's configuration file for verification. Finally, write a historical summary report to ~/Desktop/guest_star_report.txt that includes the terms 'Crab Nebula', 'Taurus', 'Song Dynasty', and 'Kaifeng'.
